name: Keyshawn Henderson
ai_summary: Certified RVT with 1+ year experience working with ages 3-7 and autism, renewed Feb 2026. Located 5-10mi away in GA, available FT/PT, and uses redirection for conflict resolution.

transcripts.q3:
My name is Keisha Henderson. I have been working as an rvt for a little over a year. Now, I had got my certification was back in February of 2025 and I had just renew my certifications in February 2026 this year. And I love working with kids, just simply because of the growth aspects that you get to see throughout their development. Not only that, but I have also worked with kids with autism and being a part of their Journey has really been so revolutionary to me.
 I have worked with kids from the ages of 3 to 7 years of age and it has been just an absolute joy and pleasure of mines.
transcripts.q4: I live in a frat, a Georgia. I would like to stay within the area. The furthest I would be willing to travel, will be in the Johns Creek area. So around maybe no more than 5 to 10 miles within of my location.
transcripts.q5: I am open to both full-time and part-time positions.
transcripts.q6:
Often times when kids have conflict with one, another is often dude to seeking attention or they are trying to get access to an item, whatever the case may be, it is easy to redirect the child, let them know. Hey, there are better ways to get your friends attention or to express your feelings with your friends and this is how we can do so either by tapping them or even have a conversation saying, hey you hurt my feelings and
 And resolving the issues. That way, that is how I will resolve the conflict between two kids.
transcripts.q7: Working as a case, teacher will be perfect for me because of the flexibility with the hours and because of the experience that I've had working as an rvt having the ability to redirect kids and giving them the opportunity to have a voice and properly Express themselves is something that will make me a perfect fit with being up kiss teacher.
